calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lilian Ng for Ping Wen.

The Court noted that the surviving spouse declined to consult with an independent attorney prior to signing the stipulation. Ms. Ng reported that she is satisfied that her clients understand that they are giving up their rights to the property, and does not believe that there is any exploitation occurring. The Accounting petition Re: Report, Fees and Final Distribution was granted (subject to review of written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
